semi_synthetic_source: ES one-minute close-to-close point changes from the frozen D1 minute feature store, centered and rescaled to 150 USD standard deviation; candidate signals and candidate PnL are never read
acceptance: Each control world independently must have null FPR <= 0.10 and meaningful-effect power >= 0.60.
CONTRE: Le recentrage et la remise a l'echelle conservent la forme empirique mais pas le niveau absolu de volatilite conditionnelle; le resultat calibre le validateur et non une strategie.
